title: 4-Bedroom Terrace Duplex + Study — Durumi, Abuja
shortDescription: Brand new 4-bedroom terrace duplex with study, all ensuite, fitted kitchen, BQ, and solar borehole.
fullDescription:
This is a brand new 4-bedroom terrace duplex in Durumi — finished to a contemporary standard and positioned along the American International School Road corridor, one of Abuja's most established and secure neighbourhoods.

Every bedroom is ensuite. The ground floor opens into a spacious living and dining area, with a fitted kitchen with modern cabinetry leading to the rear. A family lounge on the upper floor gives you a second living space separate from the main reception. The study adds flexible room for a home office or additional accommodation. A 1-room BQ handles staff or guest needs independently.

Large windows throughout bring in natural light and give the interiors an open, airy feel. A solar-powered borehole means water supply is not dependent on PHCN or tanker schedules. Ample parking is available within the compound.

The location speaks for itself — Durumi is quiet, well-maintained, and within minutes of the American International School, Wuse 2, and the central business district. This is the kind of address that holds its value.

title: Commercial Shop — The Promenade Mall, Lokogoma
shortDescription: Prime commercial space in the bustling Promenade Mall, Lokogoma.
